nasb.text: from Beth-gilgal and from their fields in Geba and Azmaveth, for the singers had built themselves villages around Jerusalem.

esv.text: also from Beth-gilgal and from the region of Geba and Azmaveth, for the singers had built for themselves villages around Jerusalem.

cnv.text: 從伯．吉甲，從迦巴和押瑪弗的田莊聚集前來；因為歌唱者在耶路撒冷四圍為自己建造村莊。

ccb.text: 伯·吉甲，以及迦巴和押玛弗地区被招聚起来，因为歌乐手已在耶路撒冷周围为自己建立了村庄。
